D-S6-1.discrepancy: Corpus review CORPUS_REVIEW_18_ZENODO_RECORDS_20260512.md J.3 footnote stated '13 rejections + 1 withdrawal + 2 blacklists across submission_log.txt' with explicit caveat 'Numerical figures plausible; operator should verify exact count.'
D-S6-1.actual: 20 distinct rejection events across 16 unique manuscript families; 2 author-side withdrawals; 5 venues on project blacklist per _RULES.txt §F (ExpMath, NNTDM, Integers, J. Integer Sequences, Annals of Math).
D-S6-1.note: The corpus review's caveat was correct; this retrospective verifies the exact count. The '2 blacklists' figure refers to ExpMath + NNTDM (the resubmission-relevant pair); the 5-blacklist figure includes precautionary venue-side AI-policy bans on never-tried venues.
